description_long: This is an adult woman with a slender build, dressed in a fitted, cropped jacket and a short, patterned skirt. She wears knee-high heeled boots and a form-fitting top that exposes her midriff. Her hair is styled in a straight, shoulder-length bob, and her arms hang naturally at her sides. The outfit is urban and fashionable, suitable for a city street or nightlife setting. The figure's facial features are defined, and her posture is upright and relaxed. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and her overall appearance is neat and well-groomed.
description: A fashionable adult woman in a cropped jacket, short skirt, and knee-high heeled boots, standing upright with a straight bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cropped jacket, exposed midriff, patterned skirt, and knee-high boots, with arms relaxed at her sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the jacket, skirt, and boots, as well as the straight bob hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the jacket, skirt, and boots, with the hair falling straight down to the shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the outfit and the straight bob hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted cropped jacket, short patterned skirt, form-fitting top, knee-high heeled boots
